2026-04-23T09:01:27.3486465Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3488459Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3488912Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3489294Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3489608Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3489840Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3490004Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3490179Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3490355Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T09:01:27.3490585Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T09:01:27.3491322Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-23T09:05:27.3875899Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T09:02:22.637206988Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58588,\"title\":\"[DefenderEasm] Docs: Add service-specific Key Concepts, code examples, and snippet-backed samples to README\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit 360612179 (#58563) by `@azure-sdk`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nA new management-plane SDK for Microsoft Defender External Attack Surface Management (Defender EASM) was added. The package ships two resource types (`EasmWorkspaceResource` and `EasmLabelResource`) and a README was created with placeholder content. This is the first public release (1.0.0-beta.4).\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **Examples section is empty of real code** — only a generic link to `(aka.ms/redacted) with no EASM-specific code snippets\\n- **Key concepts section is generic** — only links to general Azure SDK docs; no description of what Workspaces, Labels, or Tasks are in the context of the EASM service\\n- **Authenticate the client has no code sample** — just links to a quickstart guide, no inline `DefaultAzureCredential` + `ArmClient` snippet\\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory** — there are auto-generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/`, but no hand-authored snippet-backed samples that can be injected into the README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify README.md\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/README.md`\\n**Action:** Edit\\n\\nReplace the current `## Key concepts`, `## Documentation`, and `## Examples` sections with the content below. The `## Documentation` section is non-standard and should be merged into the other sections.\\n\\nReplace the section from `## Key concepts` through the end of `## Examples` with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n**Workspaces** are the top-level container for Defender EASM data. Each workspace is scoped to a subscription and resource group, and contains the discovered attack surface assets and associated metadata for your organization. Use `EasmWorkspaceResource` to create, read, update, and delete workspaces.\\n\\n**Labels** are user-defined tags that can be applied to discovered assets within a workspace to organize and filter them. Use `EasmLabelResource` and `EasmLabelCollection` to manage labels within a workspace.\\n\\n**Tasks** represent long-running operations within a workspace (for example, running a discovery run). Use `GetTaskByWorkspace` on `EasmWorkspaceResource` to poll the status of an ongoing task.\\n\\n### Thread safety\\n\\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe and independent of each other ([more details]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n\\n### Additional concepts\\n\\n[Client options](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#configuring-service-clients-using-clientoptions) |\\n[Accessing the response](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#accessing-http-response-details-using-responset) |\\n[Long-running operations](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#consuming-long-running-operations-using-operationt) |\\n[Handling failures](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#reporting-errors-requestfailedexception) |\\n[Diagnostics](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#logging) |\\n[Mocking]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) |\\n[Client lifetime]((devblogs.microsoft.com/redacted)\\n\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Authenticate the client and get the workspace collection\\n\\n```\\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\nstring subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\nstring resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\nResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\\nResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n\\nEasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n```\\n\\n### Create or update a workspace\\n\\n```\\nEasmWorkspaceData data = new EasmWorkspaceData(new AzureLocation(\\u0026#34;eastus\\u0026#34;));\\nArmOperation lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-easm-workspace\\u0026#34;, data);\\nEasmWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\\nConsole.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\n### List all workspaces in a resource group\\n\\n```\\nawait foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in workspaces.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Workspace: {workspace.Data.Name} in {workspace.Data.Location}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Create a label\\n\\n```\\nEasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\\nEasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\\nArmOperation labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-label\\u0026#34;, labelData);\\nEasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\\nConsole.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created label: {label.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\nFor more code examples, see [Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Generated/Samples).\\n```\\n\\nAlso update the `### Authenticate the Client` section (under Getting started) to add a code sample:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Authenticate the Client\\n\\nTo create an authenticated client and start interacting with Microsoft Azure resources, see the [quickstart guide here](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/doc/dev/mgmt_quickstart.md).\\n\\n```\\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add snippet-backed sample tests\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Samples/Sample_DefenderEasm.cs`\\n**Action:** Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_DefenderEasm : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n \\u0026#34;dummyrg\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_ListWorkspaces\\n            await foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;dummyrg\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n            EasmWorkspaceResource workspace = await workspaces.GetAsync(\\u0026#34;my-easm-workspace\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateLabel\\n            EasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\\n            EasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\\n            ArmOperation labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-label\\u0026#34;, labelData);\\n            EasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created label: {label.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n Each workspace is scoped to a subscription and resource group, and contains the discovered attack surface assets and associated metadata for your organization. Use `EasmWorkspaceResource` to create, read, update, and delete workspaces.\\n\\n**Labels** are user-defined tags that can be applied to discovered assets within a workspace to organize and filter them. Use `EasmLabelResource` and `EasmLabelCollection` to manage labels within a workspace.\\n\\n**Tasks** represent long-running operations within a workspace (for example, running a discovery run). Use `GetTaskByWorkspace` on `EasmWorkspaceResource` to poll the status of an ongoing task.\\n\\n### Thread safety\\n\\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe and independent of each other ([more details]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n\\n### Additional concepts\\n\\n[Client |\\n[Diagnostics](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md#logging) |\\n[Mocking]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) |\\n[Client lifetime]((devblogs.microsoft.com/redacted)\\n\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Authenticate the client and get the workspace collection\\n\\n```\\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\nstring subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\nstring resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\nResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\\nResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n\\nEasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n```\\n\\n### Create or update a workspace\\n\\n```\\nEasmWorkspaceData data = new EasmWorkspaceData(new AzureLocation(\\u0026#34;eastus\\u0026#34;));\\nArmOperation lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-easm-workspace\\u0026#34;, data);\\nEasmWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\\nConsole.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\n### List all workspaces in a resource group\\n\\n```\\nawait foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in workspaces.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Workspace: {workspace.Data.Name} in {workspace.Data.Location}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Create a label\\n\\n```\\nEasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\\nEasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\\nArmOperation labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-label\\u0026#34;, labelData);\\nEasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\\nConsole.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created label: {label.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\nFor more code examples, see [Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Generated/Samples).\\n```\\n\\nAlso update the `### Authenticate the Client` section (under Getting started) to add a code sample:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Authenticate the Client\\n\\nTo create an authenticated client and start interacting with Microsoft Azure resources, see the [quickstart guide here](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/doc/dev/mgmt_quickstart.md).\\n\\n```\\nTokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add snippet-backed sample tests\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/tests/Samples/Sample_DefenderEasm.cs`\\n**Action:** Create\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_AuthenticateAndGetCollection\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task Sample_CreateWorkspace()\\n        {\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;dummyrg\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateWorkspace\\n            EasmWorkspaceData data = new EasmWorkspaceData(new AzureLocation(\\u0026#34;eastus\\u0026#34;));\\n            ArmOperation lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-easm-workspace\\u0026#34;, data);\\n            EasmWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task Sample_ListWorkspaces()\\n        {\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;dummyrg\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_ListWorkspaces\\n            await foreach (EasmWorkspaceResource workspace in workspaces.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Workspace: {workspace.Data.Name} in {workspace.Data.Location}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task Sample_CreateLabel()\\n        {\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;dummyrg\\u0026#34;);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\\n            EasmWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroupResource.GetEasmWorkspaces();\\n            EasmWorkspaceResource workspace = await workspaces.GetAsync(\\u0026#34;my-easm-workspace\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            #region Snippet:DefenderEasmSample_CreateLabel\\n            EasmLabelCollection labels = workspace.GetEasmLabels();\\n            EasmLabelData labelData = new EasmLabelData();\\n            ArmOperation labelLro = await labels.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\u0026#34;my-label\\u0026#34;, labelData);\\n            EasmLabelResource label = labelLro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created label: {label.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n\\u0026gt; **Note:** Verify the base class name against `DefenderEasmManagementTestBase.cs` in the tests directory. Use whatever base class the existing tests inherit from.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nCurrent README sections are mostly present but need the following fixes:\\n\\n| Section | Status | Action |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| Getting started - Install the package | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Getting started - Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Getting started - Authenticate the client | ⚠️ Link only | Add `DefaultAzureCredential` + `ArmClient` snippet |\\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic link only | Add EASM-specific Workspace / Label / Task explanations |\\n| ~~Documentation~~ (non-standard) | ❌ Non-standard section | Remove; merge content into Key concepts and Next steps |\\n| Examples | ❌ No code snippets | Add snippet-referenced code for create workspace, list workspaces, create label |\\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Next steps | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Contributing | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next.\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 defendereasm` — reads `#region Snippet:` tags from test files and injects the code into README.md placeholder blocks. Check the git diff after running to confirm README was updated correctly.\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 defendereasm` — regenerates public API listing files under `sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/api/`. Required if any public types or members were changed.\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/defendereasm/Azure.ResourceManager.DefenderEasm/` — ensures consistent code formatting.\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt;
